responseBody.message: [AUTHORITY_FAILURE_INCOMPLETE_RESULT] Authority failure for "characterDrafts": [guardian:character-persistence] Character save would create invalid upstream state. Upstream outline incomplete. Issues: character_contract_incomplete. Messages: 人物工序启动前，主角、对手和当前人物小传必须满足正式人物合同：旧版要有姓名、小传、目标、优势、短板和弧光；V2 要满足五维必填，核心人物还要补齐压力、短板、目标和弧光。
